title: Why USA is disadvantaged in AI Race
summary: The US leads in AI chips, models, and applications but lags in powering data centers due to fragmented regulatory structures, while China's centralized governance and 25,000+ miles of ultra-high-voltage transmission lines give it a strategic advantage. The video analyzes how US tech companies work around grid constraints through behind-the-meter solutions and examines whether efficiency gains can close the infrastructure gap.
